description: Quality-eval corpus: 100 posts across 5 categories, 20 per category. Used by docs/quality-evals/methodology.md. Categories chosen to be substantively different so cross-category recommendations are meaningful.
posts: TODO: 100 real WP-export rows go here at quality-eval time. The corpus is intentionally NOT committed pre-populated — the human evaluator imports a representative WP export (or the maintained internal corpus) before running the protocol.
Each post entry MUST include: { post_id, post_title, post_excerpt, post_content (≤1500 words), categories: [slug] }.
Categories MUST be the 5 above with exactly 20 posts each.
Bump the file to -v2.json if the structure changes.
